prompt: Create a bright, highly detailed anime illustration of twin young girls with pale silver-white bobbed hair walking side by side on a sunny resort pathway in Tomamu, Hokkaido. Both characters have their faces intentionally covered by smooth pale gray square blocks with no facial features. They wear matching airy white layered dresses with pale blue-gray ribbons, oversized light cardigans, delicate bead chains, pom-pom charms, small crossbody bags, white socks, and chunky white sneakers. Count exactly two girls: the left twin points outward with her left hand and has a feathery bird-like wing accessory and fluffy pom-pom bag at her side; the right twin holds one hand near her collar and carries a small iridescent transparent shoulder bag. Add exactly two fluffy white long-tailed-tit bird hair ornaments, one perched beside each twin’s head, with tiny black eyes and soft black-and-white feather markings. Surround them with exactly nine visible translucent soap bubbles with rainbow iridescence, distributed across foreground, midground, and sky. The background is a realistic anime resort landscape: a paved garden walkway, vivid green lawns, shrubs, white-barked trees, mountain slopes, blue sky with soft clouds, a chalet-style building and patio umbrellas on the right, exactly two tall greenish condominium towers in the left background, and one dark rectangular high-rise tower in the right background. On the left foreground place a black resort sign reading TOMAMU HOKKAIDO 星野リゾート. Use soft summer daylight, sparkling highlights, pastel blue-white color grading, delicate linework, dreamy iridescent effects, shallow depth of field, and a polished Japanese AI-art aesthetic. Overall mood: whimsical, fresh, luxurious resort fantasy.
